tagline: Expert Pool Tile Cleaning and Restoration Services in Las Vegas

hero.headline:
Ugly Calcium Buildup Gone In One
Visit
hero.subheadline: Your pool tile should sparkle, not embarrass you. Tile Savers of Nevada uses advanced glass bead blasting to remove years of calcium buildup safely, without damaging your tile. Trusted by Las Vegas homeowners and communities for over 23 years.

services.label: Our Specialties
services.headline: Pool Tile Experts Who<br class="hidden md:block"> Restore What Others Can't
services.subtitle: From stubborn calcium lines to full tile remodels, we handle it all. Our advanced blasting technology cleans without chemicals or damage, saving your tile and your wallet.

cards.title: Calcium Removal & Blasting
cards.description: Advanced glass bead and MaxxStrip blasting removes years of calcium buildup fast. No harsh chemicals, no tile damage, just sparkling results in a single visit.

cards.title: Tile Repair & Replacement
cards.description: Cracked, loose, or failing tiles replaced with precision. We match your existing tile and restore your pool's clean, finished look.

cards.title: Pool Acid Washing
cards.description: Deep acid wash cleaning for pools with heavy grime and staining. We drain the pool and restore plaster to its original bright finish.

cards.title: Pool Tile Remodeling
cards.description: Ready for a new look? We handle full tile upgrades in porcelain, glass, natural stone, and more. Design to installation, done right.

cards.title: Fountain & Monument Cleaning
cards.description: We remove mineral deposits from fountains, statues, monuments, and architectural stone features. Same proven blasting methods, beautiful results.

cards.title: Pebbletech Cleaning
cards.description: Specialized cleaning for pebbletech and textured pool surfaces. We remove stains and mineral buildup to restore the natural beauty of your finish.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Tile That Looks Brand New

steps.title: Request Your Free Estimate
steps.description: Call or fill out our form. We'll schedule a convenient time to inspect your tile and give you an honest, no-pressure quote. Most estimates within 48 hours.

steps.title: We Blast Away the Buildup
steps.description: Our licensed technicians arrive on schedule with professional-grade glass bead blasting equipment. Most jobs are completed in a single visit with zero tile damage.

steps.title: Enjoy Tile That Sparkles
steps.description: See the dramatic before-and-after difference. Your pool tile looks brand new again, and stays that way. We stand behind every job we do.

about.label: Why Las Vegas Trusts Us
about.headline: Family-Owned, Woman-Owned, and Proudly Local Since 2003
about.description: Tile Savers of Nevada is a family-owned, woman-owned, and minority-owned business that has been restoring pool tile across Clark County for over 23 years. We are fully licensed (NV #85046), insured with general liability and workers comp, and trusted by multi-family communities throughout the Las Vegas Valley. Our advanced blasting methods work safely on every surface type, from glazed tile to marble to pebbletech.

features.title: Damage-Free Cleaning Methods
features.description: Our glass bead and MaxxStrip blasting removes calcium without scratching or damaging your tile. Safer than acid, faster than hand scrubbing.

features.title: Fully Licensed & Insured
features.description: Nevada Contractor License #85046, general liability insurance, and workers compensation. Your property and our team are fully protected.

features.title: Military Discount Available
features.description: We proudly offer a military discount to thank those who serve. Ask about our special pricing when you call for your free estimate.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different, so we quote after a free inspection. No hidden fees, no upselling, just honest pricing for quality tile work.

guarantee.headline: Our "Sparkling Tile" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with our tile cleaning or restoration work, we'll come back and make it right at no extra charge. We've built our reputation over 23 years by standing behind every job. Your satisfaction is not negotiable.

faqs.question: How does glass bead blasting work?
faqs.answer: We use tiny glass beads propelled at high pressure to safely remove calcium deposits and mineral buildup from your pool tile. It's fast, effective, and unlike chemical or acid methods, it won't damage or etch your tile surface.

faqs.question: How long does a typical tile cleaning take?
faqs.answer: Most residential pool tile cleanings are completed in a single visit, typically 2-4 hours depending on the size of your pool and severity of the buildup. We'll give you an accurate time estimate during your free inspection.

faqs.question: Will the cleaning damage my pool tile?
faqs.answer: Absolutely not. Our glass bead and MaxxStrip blasting methods are specifically designed to remove calcium without scratching, chipping, or damaging tile. We safely clean glazed tile, marble, granite, slate, glass tile, pebbletech, and natural stone.

faqs.question: Do you work with HOAs and property managers?
faqs.answer: Yes! We are a trusted vendor for many multi-family communities across Clark County. We handle commercial pools, community pools, fountains, and monuments. Contact us for volume pricing and scheduled maintenance.

faqs.question: How often should pool tile be cleaned?
faqs.answer: In the Las Vegas area, we recommend professional calcium removal every 2-3 years depending on your water chemistry and how quickly buildup forms. Regular cleaning prevents damage and keeps your tile looking its best.

testimonials.text: This company was great! Reasonable rates and excellent service. Very professional team. The tile now looks perfect with no ugly calcium buildup. Fabulous results.
